events.fullCaption:
DTLA’s first-ever structured dog pack walk is here 🐾 presented by @fitpalslosangeles in partnership with @theblocla and @downtown_la

DATE :
Saturday, May 16
9:30 AM - 1:00 PM

Bark at the Bloc is bringing together dog owners, trainers, and the LA pet community for a trainer-led pack walk + adopt & shop event in Downtown Los Angeles.

Start your morning with a guided group walk through DTLA (limited to 60 dogs) focused on real-world training, discipline, and confidence—then stay for a full dog social takeover at The Bloc.

Expect adoptable dogs, live DJ sets, pet vendors, giveaways, and one of the most unique dog-friendly events in Los Angeles right now.

📍 The Bloc — 700 W 7th St, Los Angeles
🕤 Meet-up: 9:30 AM | Walk: 9:45 AM
🕚 Adopt + Shop: 11 AM – 1 PM

Whether you’re pulling up with your dog or just want to tap into the community, this is one of those DTLA events you don’t want to miss.

Tag someone bringing their dog 🐶👇

#LosAngelesEvents #DTLAEvents #DogEventsLA #DogFriendlyLA #ThingstoDoLA

events.fullCaption:
By popular demand… we’re combining our two of most requested activities: PACK WALKS & OFF-LEASH PLAY in one epic afternoon! 🐕‍🦺🐾

Join us Sunday, Sept 14 at @dogdropartsdistrict 💙 We’ll have two optional pack walks, and a basecamp for off-leash fun, social time, and pup-approved vendors in Dogdrop’s secure indoor facility.

Here’s what to expect:
🚶‍♀️ Two rounds of 30mins structured pack walks with some training exercises led by @fitpalslosangeles :
Group Walk #1: 3:30 PM
Group Walk #2: 4:30 PM
We will be able to take the first 30 pups to sign in at the event for each group!

🐕 Leashed & off-leash play areas for your pup to socialize safely indoors in Dogdrop facilities with an agility course!

🛋️ Chill out in @petsfit.us sponsored relaxation corner and try their portable crates, playpens and hiking backpacks, and giveaways 
☕️Sip while you shop on complimentary @minorfigures oat milk blueberry matcha from @ybsy_superette & treats for the pups
🛒Shop @brewinaussie.co and explore their signature pet lifestyle and enrichment items
🍦Spoil your pup with some @woofwhips frozen dog treats
🦮Meet and greet with the @fitpalslosangeles team and learn more about their DTLA Dog Walking Club & structured pack walks
📚Celebrate @thesouldogseries book release
🎁 Swag + giveaways for pups & their people

Whether you’re walking, shopping, or just here for the doggy play and community vibes, this is a feel-good way to spend your Sunday afternoon.

📍Dogdrop Arts District
🗓️ Sunday, Sept 14
⏰ 3–6PM

Tag your walking buddy & free RSVP link in bio! 🐾👇

#DogsOnlySocialClub #LADogEvents #DogsofLA

🎟️Admission is $10 per dog (This
events.fullCaption:
We’re Turning ONE!🥳
It’s been one amazing year since Zoom Room Lakewood opened its doors—and we’re ready to celebrate with all the dog lovers who made it possible!

🎟️Admission is $10 per dog (This event is free for customers with a VIP membership)

Address: 4154 Woodruff Ave, Lakewood, CA 90713

Join us for a fun-filled anniversary party featuring:

🎨A caricature artist
📷Professional photography
🍔Food and drinks
🥎Fun activities for both dogs and humans
🎁Goodie bags and raffles

‼️BONUS: Goodies from Fi

🎟 You can purchase a ticket here:
https://zoomroom.com/location/lakewood/#!new-schedule
Select the date August 9th to view the event schedule and make a payment. You’ll be asked to log in or create an account.

August 9th Special Schedule (One Day Only!):
🕚 11:00 AM – 11:45 AM: Ready, Set, Zoom! – $10
A fun intro class featuring a taste of our most popular offerings: obedience, agility, and Puplates. Perfect for new customers!

🕛 12:00 PM – 12:45 PM: Intro to Agility – $10
Experience the thrill of agility for new customers-friendly class designed just for our anniversary.

🎉 3:00 PM – 5:00 PM: One-Year Anniversary Carnival Party
Join the full celebration with games, prizes, treats, and more!

If you have any questions about purchasing a ticket, feel free to call or text us at 562-270-4510.
Spots are limited—grab your ticket today and come celebrate with us and your pup!

@lakewood.chamber @losangeles.pups @fimeetups @fi.dogs @seanrichardsphoto @notorious_cfd

events.captionPreview:
Your dog is going to love May 🐶🤩👇

If your social plans revolve around your dog, May is looking very good so far...

We’re particularly excited about two festivals happening outside of London this
events.fullCaption:
Your dog is going to love May 🐶🤩👇

If your social plans revolve around your dog, May is looking very good so far...

We’re particularly excited about two festivals happening outside of London this month and we’re planning our May around those...

🧡 Goodwoof - 16 & 17 May at Goodwood, Chichester
💚 Dogstival - 30 & 31 May at Burley Park, in the New Forest

🏆 And if you’re staying closer to home, dog show season is officially kicking off with shows at Brockwell Park, the Old Royal Naval College, and Sydenham Wells Park 💫

🎬 For cinema lovers, it’s basically a Devil Wears Prada 2 takeover at dog-friendly screenings across London this weekend & next 👠

🎪 And one we’d really recommend putting in the diary: Doggie Day at The Brunswick in Bloomsbury on 16 May -  it’s free & there’s lots on the line-up 🤩

So far there are 47 events in & around London this May, and we’ve curated them all in one place so you don’t have to go searching 🤗

🗓️ Full calendar with booking details, updated weekly, linked in @thedogvine bio

🐕 Follow along for more dog-friendly London guides

#dogfriendlylondon #thingstodowithyourdog #londondogs

events.fullCaption:
Daisy’s Dachshund Meet Ups are a regular monthly London-based, relaxed, friendly and social way to meet other dachshunds and their families 🌸

NEXT EVENT:
🗓️Sunday 24th May 2026, meeting 11am 
📍 Gunnersbury Park (see map for details)

Expect lots of play time, a 20-30min easy walk, a few treats, and a lot of photo ops. The perfect opportunity for fellow puppy owners to socialise with each other (& Willow too!)

If you’ve been to one of our meet ups before we cannot wait to see you again. If you’re thinking of joining us for the first time a huge WELCOME and please do!! Also DM us to join our new group chat for attendees 💌

Non-dachshund owners are welcome to join and pet Daisy. Please do not pet or feed any other dogs without their owner’s permission. You are responsible for your own dog when attending this free event. 

See you soon,

Claire, Daisy and Willow 🐾

#dachsundmeetup #sausagedogmeetup #londondogmeetup #londondogevents #londondachshunds

events.captionPreview:
We’re so excited to be part of Good Bois Club 🐾💌

This weekend, korean k9 rescue is teaming up with Good Bois Club to spotlight some of our adoptable dogs and bring them into a space built around co
events.fullCaption:
We’re so excited to be part of Good Bois Club 🐾💌

This weekend, korean k9 rescue is teaming up with Good Bois Club to spotlight some of our adoptable dogs and bring them into a space built around community, creativity, and connection.

Come find out which good boi is good for you, hear their stories, and spend time with poeple who own pup. Visit our website to view pups who are looking for their next chapter. Whether you’re ready to adopt, curious about fostering, or just want to learn more about rescue, we’d love to see you there.

The event will include:
 ✶ pet portraits
 ✶ a photobooth
 ✶ interactive installations
 ✶ block printing
 ✶ flash tattoos
 ✶ and lots of moments to connect with other dog lovers
Every dog has a story. This is a chance to be part of what comes next.

PS: There will be no dogs for adoption at the event. Visit Korean K9 to adopt your new buddy!

📍 Studio 45, 213 troutman st
 📅 Apr 24 (1–6 pm) + Apr 25 (10 am–6 pm)
Come hang out, ask questions, and maybe find someone who feels like home.
#nycdogrescue #koreank9rescue #brooklyndogevents #nycdogevents #nycdogadoption

🚄 JR東日本ブース (@pandabashi_sky)

events.fullCaption:
🚃🐶パンダバシわんわんピクニック 
＼ ブース紹介（前半）／

5/16(土)・17(日)に上野駅直結「パンダ橋」で開催される #わんわんピクニック ✨
スワイプして、気になるブースをチェックしてね🐶♪

🚄 JR東日本ブース (@pandabashi_sky)
新幹線「こまち」のミニ電車に乗れる激レア体験！わんちゃん用制服での撮影や、その場で作れるオリジナル缶バッジ（500円〜）など、駅直結イベントならではの企画が満載です✨

🧳 PETiCO (@petico_jp)
JR規定サイズ対応のペットキャリー「iCO+」や「NOA」の試乗ができます。隣には「愛犬との電車旅」をテーマにした限定フォトブースも登場！📸

🦴 株式会社阪急ハロードッグ (@hankyuhellodog)
愛犬の健康を考えた「eugreen」や、松阪牛の贅沢おやつ「SUSOWA」が登場。特別な日のご褒美を見つけに来てくださいね✨

🥣 ココグルメ (@coco_gourmet_event)
獣医師監修の手づくりドッグフード。大人気のチキンなど全5種類の試食をご用意！会場限定特典もあるので、ぜひお立ち寄りください😋

📛 おでかけわんこ部 (@odewanbu)
公式アプリDL＆部員登録で、オリジナル缶バッジをプレゼント！🎁 すでにDL済みの方も、ぜひ遊びに来てね♪

📸 PREMIUM DOG PHOTO (@premium_dog_photo)
インターペットでも大人気！独自の世界観で愛犬を美しく描く、ワンランク上の撮影体験。一生モノの1枚を✨

🛒 ピッコロカーネ by P.C.Trading (@petcart_piccolocane)
4輪で安定感抜群！軽くて操作しやすいペットカートの展示。広々とした居住スペースを実際に体感してみてください🐾

🎀 LOU LOU (@loulou_dog_official)
職人仕立ての日本製ハーネス専門店。首への負担を考えた設計で、着脱もらくちん！夏にぴったりの「冷やしハーネス」も新登場❄️

🍭 LILY PET WORLD (@lily_petworld)
お散歩に便利な「ハンズフリーリード」や、つけるだけで一気に華やかになる「ヘアカチューシャ」を販売します✨

🧸 BITE ME (@biteme_jp)
韓国発のペットライフスタイルブランド。世界基準の安全性をクリアした、可愛くてユニークなおもちゃがいっぱい！🧸

🐟 マルカイコーポレーション（nicocook） (@nicocook_official)
国産・無添加にこだわった「nicocook」。イベント限定商品の「のどぐろキューブ」を各日50袋限定で販売します！お早めに✨

🛋️ braaa (@braaa_official)
シンプルで洗練されたデザインと、高い機能性を兼ね備えたペットアイテム。愛犬との暮らしをより楽しく、快適にする提案です。

🍽️ &WAN kitchen (@andwan_kitchen)
愛犬と泊まれるリゾート「&WAN九十九里」料理長監修！千葉県産の食材を使った無添加レトルトやおやつをご用意しています🍽️

❄️ eqpé (@eqpe_jp)
UVサマーシールドやネッククーラーなど、涼しさと美しさを纏うサステナブルなウェア。愛犬の夏支度にぴったりです☀️

🗞️ GOOD MART (@dog.times_news)
1950年代のニュースペーパーボーイをイメージ！ヴィンテージ感がお洒落な、ワンちゃん専用特化ベストが登場します🗞️

events.captionPreview: Get ready for a splashin’ good time this Saturday at our Summer Splash Dock Diving event! 🌊🎉 Our dock diving competition is perfect for everyone, whether you're an experienced jumper or just startin
events.fullCaption:
Get ready for a splashin’ good time this Saturday at our Summer Splash Dock Diving event! 🌊🎉 Our dock diving competition is perfect for everyone, whether you're an experienced jumper or just starting out. New to dock diving? No worries! We have a Rampers division where your dog can jump from the ramp and you can join your dog in the water if needed. And don’t miss out on our exciting new game after the main event, Hydro Ball, for dogs who love to swim and play ball. Join us at @highdesertdogsportsphelan for a fun-filled day, and bring your friends—spectators are welcome too! 🐶🏆

#DockDivingDogs #HydroBallFun #SummerSplash #DogSports #PawfectDay #CanineCompetition #SplashIntoFun #DoggieDelight! #phelanca , #phelandogevents, #socaldogevents #caninesbeattheheat, #dogdaysofsummer

events.captionPreview:
👋Meet Oso a 1 year old neutered male Chiweenie Mix.

Oso comes to us after a rough beginning, surrendered by an owner who no longer wanted to provide care and left him living in unsafe, neglected con
events.fullCaption:
👋Meet Oso a 1 year old neutered male Chiweenie Mix.

Oso comes to us after a rough beginning, surrendered by an owner who no longer wanted to provide care and left him living in unsafe, neglected conditions. Even with that history, he’s arrived without bitterness—just a young dog trying to figure out where he fits. 🐾

At only a year old, he’s still very much in his “becoming” stage. You can see it in the way he observes everything first, like he’s quietly taking notes before deciding how to respond. There’s a softness to him, mixed with a cautious curiosity that grows a little more each day.

He loves to checkin for cuddles, walks great on leash, and loves to connect and be close to you.

He isn’t asking for much—just consistency, safety, and someone who sees him as worth the effort it takes to rebuild trust. With time, Oso has every chance to settle into a steady, loyal companion who bonds deeply once he knows he’s secure.💫

He’s ready for a home that doesn’t change its mind about him.🩵

📍1121 Hillcrest Blvd. Inglewood, CA 90301

Adoption Events 🐾Saturday + Sunday 11am-5pm

#myfavoritebreedisrescued 
#ForeverHome

events.fullCaption:

✨ ONLY 11 DAYS TILL PAWFEST ✨

PAWFEST is for all dogs including the anxious, reactive, and sensitive and nervous ones 💛

PAWFEST offers a dedicated Yellow Dog Zone 💛💛
A calm, low-stimulation area designed for dogs who need space, destress , and understanding.

 Yellow Zone:
💛Quiet  away from busy crowds
💛clam with place to breathe
💛Enrichment activities like licki mats & snuffle mats
💛 naturally  sniffing, licking & destress 

There also will be extra support from @puptalk101 helping owners understand their dogs’ behaviours  body language better and their feelings  and in more depth 💛

🎟️Tickets are still available 
Go and grab your tickets now

✨🐾 Happy FriYAY friends! ✨

Last weekend I was living my best soggy life with @k9aquasportsuk at Loseley Park — splashing, jumping, and trying (very unsuccessfully 😅) to be a graceful swimmer.

Sadly this weekend’s Dog Fest fun has been cancelled 💔 … so no festival vibes for me. But don’t worry, I’ll just be here daydreaming about pool dives, waggy tails, and plotting how to soak Mum again (see the penultimate video for evidence 👀💦).

Swipe through to see:
➡️ me embracing my inner otter 🦦
➡️ my “exit strategy” that left Mum drenched 🙈
➡️ my first tentative doggy paddle 🫶

If only Fridays could always look this fun! Who else is missing the Dog Fest buzz already? 💕

#HappyFriday from your soggy pup, Jetty 🐾💦

ALL ABOUT DOGS NEWARK 2026 💛
@allaboutdogsshow 

What a blast! We had such a fun day at AAD today. We had the best company, lots of bum scratches, and probably more shopping than I should have done 😂

We visited @twiggytags to get Spencer’s scramble harness fitted properly which Lo did amazingly for us! Our friends also purchased a Scramble harness each - can’t wait to go on our hikes with them 🤩

Spencer got some lunch at the @yearsuk stand, and looked very cute taking a picture there.

We did some sticker swaps at @bemorebondog and @nellsnaturalrawfood ❤️

We also visited the lovely @brambleand_co who gave the boys lots of attention! Always such a lovely time 🥹

Spencer and I had a go at the agility course which went amazingly! He did so well and it was nice for him to burn some energy. He also caught the eye of a very sweet spaniel girl in the queue and the kept having little sniffs at each other 😂 super adorable! 

All in all, such a lovely day. It was super busy but we made sure to take plenty of breaks and decompress when needed. 

💛 If you’re wanting to visit an upcoming AAD show, you can use code SPENCER10 for a discount 💛

#dogshowuk #dogfestival #allaboutdogs #dogfriendlyuk #dogsinyellow

🌹📚 Happy Sant Jordi from Barcelona! 🐾

Every April 23rd, Catalonia celebrates one of its most beautiful traditions: Sant Jordi, a day when the streets fill with books, red roses, and little gesture
events.fullCaption:
🌹📚 Happy Sant Jordi from Barcelona! 🐾

Every April 23rd, Catalonia celebrates one of its most beautiful traditions: Sant Jordi, a day when the streets fill with books, red roses, and little gestures of love.

Inspired by the legend of Saint George and the dragon, Sant Jordi has become so much more than a romantic tradition. In Barcelona, it’s a day for couples, friends, families, and even coworkers to exchange books and roses, while the whole city turns into a magical open-air celebration.

And the best part? Since so much of it happens outdoors, it can also be such a lovely plan to enjoy with your dog if you’re visiting Barcelona. A sunny walk, beautiful streets, book stalls, roses everywhere, and a stop at a pet-friendly terrace? Honestly, that sounds like a very good day to us.

At Wander Woofs, we help travelers enjoy Spain with their dogs through pet-friendly travel planning and on-site dog-sitting, so you can experience special local traditions and unforgettable moments without leaving your furry sidekick behind.

Have you ever experienced Sant Jordi in Barcelona? 🌹

#BarcelonaWithDogs #DogFriendlyBarcelona #PetFriendlyBarcelona

events.captionPreview:
How is it already May?!

Suddenly, everyone’s outside a little longer. The parks are greener and busier (properly bin your trash, please!) People precariously balance an iced coffee (or matcha?) in on
events.fullCaption:
How is it already May?!

Suddenly, everyone’s outside a little longer. The parks are greener and busier (properly bin your trash, please!) People precariously balance an iced coffee (or matcha?) in one hand, a lead in the other, and at least one group chat trying to organise “a quick walk” somehow turns into a four-hour afternoon. Or is that just me and my yapping?

Anyway, I thought it would be useful to put together a little guide to some of the things happening across London (and slightly beyond) this month - with and without your dog.

There are dog events, spring walks, markets, festivals, coffee spots, community days, and a few places I personally love wandering around at this time of year too.

I’ve also included where I’ll be this month, plus current photography session availability for summer because spring somehow disappears incredibly quickly every single year.

A little note though, because I know not every dog enjoys busy places:

Some of these recommendations are brilliant for confident, social dogs who love excitement and meeting people. Others are much better suited to slower wanderers, nervous dogs, or dogs who’d honestly rather stay home while you go and bring them back a treat afterwards.

And honestly? That’s completely okay too. 

Please make sure the events you take your dog to are ethical, and that they’re something they’ll actually enjoy, not just tolerate or shut down in.

One of my favourite things about photographing dogs is seeing how different they all are. Some dogs thrive in busy cafés and events. Others are happiest sniffing through woodland with one trusted person beside them.

Both are good dogs.

If you end up visiting any of these places this month, I’d genuinely love to know. And if you think I’ve missed a brilliant May recommendation, please add it in the comments so other people can discover it too.

My own schedule for May has me pretty busy, but I hope to bump into one of you somewhere, which often happens wherever I go 💜

#londondogs #dogfriendlylondon #surreydogs #whatson #londondogphotographer

Date: Wednesday 17th December

Price: £28 per person, £18 per dog

Every dog receives a gift from Santa, naughty or nice. He does not discriminate 😝

No dia 05 de Julho de 2026, o palco será o Clube S – Embarcadouro do Mussulo, reunindo paixão, qualid
events.fullCaption:
🔥 ANGOLA ROTTWEILER SHOW 2026 🔥 

Prepare-se para um dos eventos mais aguardados do ano! 🐾🇦🇴 
No dia 05 de Julho de 2026, o palco será o Clube S – Embarcadouro do Mussulo, reunindo paixão, qualidade e os melhores exemplares da raça Rottweiler em Angola.

🎤 Com a energia e carisma dos apresentadores Jacimar Azael @azaeljacimar e Nivaldo J. M. Agostinho @a.jagropet , este não será apenas um evento… será uma EXPERIÊNCIA! 

🐕 Criadores, amantes da raça e público em geral — este é o momento de celebrar a força, a disciplina e a nobreza do Rottweiler. 

🤝 Com o apoio de várias marcas e parceiros que acreditam no crescimento da cinofilia em Angola, estamos a elevar o nível! 

📍 Marca na agenda, chama os teus amigos e faz parte deste grande espetáculo. 
Porque quem vive o Rottweiler… sabe que isto é mais do que um show! 

#AngolaRottweilerShow #RottweilerAngola #EventoCanino #Cinofilia #Angola LigaRottweilerAngola

events.fullCaption:
🐾💜 Keep the momentum going for a great cause!

Our pups are still rocking their Cystic Fibrosis bandanas — and you can grab one too! Stop by our lobby to pick one up and support the fight for a cure. Every bandana helps make a difference. 💜

We’re counting down to the Cincinnati Great Strides Walk on Saturday, May 16 at 9 AM, and we’d love to see you there! It’s a dog-friendly event, so bring your pup along for a fun and meaningful morning. 🐶

Can’t make it but still want to help? You can donate here:
https://fundraise.cff.org/Cincinnati2026/Team/View/222323/PetSuites

Let’s come together, show our support, and take steps toward a cure. 💜🐾

#petsuiteseastgate #petsuitesofamerica #greatstrides #cysticfibrosis #dogfriendlyevent #dogsofinstagram

events.captionPreview: Hurry up hoomans! We took this picture on a walk the other evening, Freya ran ahead around the corner and we were plodding behind, she came back and stuck her head around the corner looking at us with
events.fullCaption:
Hurry up hoomans! We took this picture on a walk the other evening, Freya ran ahead around the corner and we were plodding behind, she came back and stuck her head around the corner looking at us with a proper “hurry up” look! 😂
.
We also wanted to talk about how amazing reps are! We are in love with our @c.i.collars slip rope collar! We reached out to @goose_and_annie who rep for them to help us design it and understand how to “build” one! Reps are just fantastic for sharing about products, helping potential customers, and just being a friendly ambassador! 
.
The things that we are most often asked about are dog training books (we really recommend @retrievingforalloccasions), where we bought our longline (orange, rounded biothane Amazon!), and dummies for starting in the gundog training world (dog dependent but DM us!). 
We’ve also been positively influenced by so many people on this app (for good!) from buying collars, to trip advice from others, and Mom even recently bought a holiday after being influenced 😂🙈 what motivates you to buy things? What have you been influenced to buy?
.
#dogcollar #dog #happydog #dogdays #handsomedog #dapperdog #collar #hungarianwirehairedvizsla #wirehairedvizsla #vizsla #hungarianvizsla #gingerdog #influencer #dogswithbeards #dogphotography #dogswithattitude #dogswithstyle #dogphoto #green #tongueouttuesday #cheekydog #dogtraining #walkies #dogwalksuk #dogsinlondon #doglover #thelondog #dogsoflondon #ilovemydog

events.captionPreview:
FOOD FOR THOUGHT: 
I'm excited as I'm heading towards Christmas with my senior Robbie....but I'm concerned about the cold outside...I always try to meditate each day on humans that are less fortunate
events.fullCaption:
FOOD FOR THOUGHT: 
I'm excited as I'm heading towards Christmas with my senior Robbie....but I'm concerned about the cold outside...I always try to meditate each day on humans that are less fortunate and the humans that are fortunate but unhappy.As a Buddhist I wow to turn my anger and frustration into a melting heart ❤ that can constantly forgive....even if it's not straight away I'm that moment.
But in Buddhism we are also encouraged to speak up AND TURN POISON INTO MEDICIN.EVRRYTHING STARTS AND END WITH YOUR ACTIONS.

If I hadn't found the article by @londontheinside about Saturdays 6th Dec @our_moh dog event were the homeless and their street dogs are encouraged to participate as well as everyone who has a roof over their heads.
What touches me more is that this is a FREE dog Christmas event....I'm not even charged to join! This for me shows the absolute necessity there is for us to show up.
I've seen too many doggy charity events and dog events that charge quite high prices just to be in a show.
Nothing wrong with that...I'd do the same as @dogamahny or Doga will be doing lots of fundraisers.
But let's put things into perspective. A third of the British are struggling with paying bills.We all know that it is impossible to rent in London if you have a normal job not a tech job.We the public are struggling too ...so thats what is so compelling that a charity that supports people without a home welcomes the public who are also struggling.Its honorable...and I believe that when there's little cash people come together ❤ for the right reason...not just for Instagram....its about change...and really creating the magic of what Christmas supposed to be.Youll touch people just being donating and talking and smiling and whatever you have just GIVE spontaneously...and you'll meet the organisation face to face ...so please come along and learn about the true magic inside your own heart this Christmas 
Thank you 
#dogamahny #doggyyoga #Christmas #homelessness #love #thespiritofchristmas #humblepie #housing crisis #compassion #sgi #londondogevents #christmastime #dogevent #finsburypark

events.captionPreview: doggiefunday and huyen.fundays will always feel like a little burst of sunshine to me. Daisy became their forever Valentine on 14 February 2016, and three months later Jasmine was found at OC Animal C
events.fullCaption:
doggiefunday and huyen.fundays will always feel like a little burst of sunshine to me. Daisy became their forever Valentine on 14 February 2016, and three months later Jasmine was found at OC Animal Care and completed the family. Adopted in loving memory of Flower the Puggle and AJ the Golden Retriever, these two rescued SoCal pug mixes have spent the years since showing exactly what second chances can look like.

No major medical issues have been publicly shared for either girl, and I honestly love that their story online has focused more on joy, rescue, and living well. Their world feels full of happy tails, matching outfits, dog-friendly adventures, cute stays, foodie fun, and the kind of everyday love that makes rescue stories shine even brighter.

I love that Daisy and Jasmine are not just adored - they are celebrated. Daisy got the sweetest gotcha day beginning as a furever Valentine, and Jasmine came along three months later to make the family whole. Together they have become the most charming little double act, turning SoCal outings into something colourful, stylish, and full of heart.

They are such a lovely reminder that rescue dogs do not just survive - they can be spoiled, treasured, dressed in pink, taken on adventures, and loved beyond measure. I am so glad these girls found their people, and that their people found them.

Happy gotcha day to beautiful Daisy, and extra love to sweet Jasmine too for completing the picture. Their story is soft, joyful, and full of the kind of love every dog deserves.

#doggiefunday #huyenfundays #DaisyAndJasmine #RescueDog #RescueDogs #AdoptDontShop #PugMix #PugMixes #SoCalDogs #DogFriendly #DogFriendlySoCal #DogAdventure #DogTravel #DogFriendlyPlaces #DogStays #DogFoodies #HappyTails #PawsitiveVibes #GotchaDay #ValentinesDayGotcha #OCAnimalCare #DogMomLife #SmallDogsOfInstagram #MatchingOutfits #DoggieFunDay

events.captionPreview:
We’re in full bloom at Boris & Horton🌸🐾

Join us for a Spring Fling Dinner at peak springtime perfection, where everything is fresh, floral, and just a little bit paw-sitively dreamy. We’re setting
events.fullCaption:
We’re in full bloom at Boris & Horton🌸🐾

Join us for a Spring Fling Dinner at peak springtime perfection, where everything is fresh, floral, and just a little bit paw-sitively dreamy. We’re setting the table for a cozy, flower-filled evening that leans all the way into the best of the season.

For the humans: a bright veggie-filled meal with roasted chicken as a main, starting with a gorgeous crudite moment, finishing with a spring strawberry dessert! For the pups: their own thoughtfully prepared, dog-friendly version of the meal—because every good boy and girl deserves a seat at the table (and a three-course treat yo’self moment).

Expect florals galore, golden-hour energy, and a room full of very cute dates—some of whom will absolutely be working the room for extra bites. It’s the perfect excuse to break out the sundress or other spring best, sip, stay a while, and let your pup sniff out some new friends.

Come hungry, bring your pup, and prepare for a night that’s equal parts elevated dinner party and delightful doggy chaos. Fur real.

#dogsofnyc #dogfriendlynyc #dinnerparty #communityweeknyc

Join us at Boris & Horton for an all-out 80s Dance Paw-ty where the dogs are the main characters and the vibes a
events.fullCaption:
Break out the leg warmers, tease that fur, and get ready to paw-ty like it’s 1985 🪩🐾

Join us at Boris & Horton for an all-out 80s Dance Paw-ty where the dogs are the main characters and the vibes are fully neon. We’re turning the café into a retro dance floor with classic 80s hits, so you and your pup can strut, spin, and serve looks all night long.

We’ll have light bites for the humans, treats for the pups, your first drink is included, and a stash of totally rad 80s party favors for both you and your dog!

And because no 80s party is complete without questionable photo evidence, we’ll have a polaroid station so you can capture your best (and most chaotic) selves.

Costumes are highly encouraged—for both species. The more outrageous, the better.

Come ready to dance, mingle, and watch your dog absolutely outshine you on the dance floor.

#dogfriendlynyc #80smusic #danceparty #communityweeknyc

Date: April 18th, 2026
Time: 12pm-3pm
Location: Dive Bar
  732 Amsterdam Ave. (W.96th ST.)
 New York, NY 10025

NYC Pawsome Squad is partnering up with the NY Dept. of Health to make sure every dog is licensed in NYC.

Why should you get your dog licensed?

-Help reunite you with your dog, if lost or stolen
-legal proof of ownership 
-helps support funding for animal in need, such as the shelter, aid for low income pet owners, and much more.
- it’s the law

🐾 PAWS Fun Dog Show – 2nd May 🐾

Good Evening Poochii’s & Peeps… we’ve got some paw-some news! 🐶✨

Wagmore Pet Boutique are absolutely thrilled to be sponsoring the PAWS Fun Dog Show this year! 🎉🐾

We can’t wait to be part of such a fab day celebrating all things dog – waggy tails, happy barks, and plenty of four-legged fun! 🐕💛

Whether your pooch is a prize-winning poser, a cheeky treat tester, or just there for the cuddles (our kind of pup 😍), this is a day not to be missed!

🐾 Come along and join the fun
🐾 Show off your gorgeous pooch
🐾 Support a brilliant event
🐾 And of course… pop by and see us!

We’ll be bringing along a selection of our handmade enrichment products, stylish accessories, and 100% natural dog treats – all designed to keep tails wagging for more! 🐶🧡

Let’s make it a day full of smiles, sniffs, and wagging tails… we can’t wait to see you there!

events.captionPreview:
🍫🐶 Así se vivió la Fábrica de Snacks ✨

Una tarde llena de juegos, premios, dulces y momentos únicos 🐾💛

Gracias a todos los que fueron parte de esta experiencia ✨

🎫 Los boletos dorados fueron e

E aquí vos deixamos aos gañadores dos catro premios do concurso canino do domingo polas festas de San Outelo 🐶🎉

Tivemos premio ao nome máis orixinal, ao can máis bonito (totalmente subxectivo 😜),
events.fullCaption:
E aquí vos deixamos aos gañadores dos catro premios do concurso canino do domingo polas festas de San Outelo 🐶🎉

Tivemos premio ao nome máis orixinal, ao can máis bonito (totalmente subxectivo 😜), un premio por habilidades e outro para o can que máis se parece ao seu dono… e aquí houbo nivel! 😂

Ademais, todos os participantes levaron un pequeno detalle: chuches de pavo ou polo 100% naturais 🐾

Para os máis curiosos, os premios consistían nunha cesta ben completa: peluche (neste caso un patiño 🦆 con son), 🎾 pelota, bebedeiro portátil, cunco personalizado de Celas de Peiro, bolsas de sticks dentais, un oso, tendón de touro, snacks de proteína de fígado, snacks de sabores, galletas variadas 🦴, unha lata de comida húmida 🥫 e un portabolsas dun emoji de caca 💩

Grazas a todos por participar e poñerlle tan bo ambiente! 💛
O ano que vén… máis e mellor 😉

#SanOutelo #CelasDePeiro #ConcursoCanino #Festas #Galicia

events.captionPreview:
Hallo Freunde 🐾

Heute waren wir auf der LG-Ausstellung in Büdingen 🐕🏆 und ich sag euch: das war eine richtig starke Gruppe in der Jugendklasse!

Und wisst ihr was? Wir haben leider nur ein V4 erre
events.fullCaption:
Hallo Freunde 🐾

Heute waren wir auf der LG-Ausstellung in Büdingen 🐕🏆 und ich sag euch: das war eine richtig starke Gruppe in der Jugendklasse!

Und wisst ihr was? Wir haben leider nur ein V4 erreicht ✨ Mama war aber zufrieden und ich natürlich dann auch 🐶💛 Auch wenn wir beide wissen: am Laufen müssen wir noch arbeiten 😅 Da heißt es für Mama und mich: weiter üben, üben, üben – wir wollen ja ein richtig gutes Team werden 💪🐾

Ich war heute total aufgeregt, überall war was los – so viele Hunde, Menschen und neue Eindrücke 🙈 Aber es hat mir trotzdem richtig Spaß gemacht! Ich hab mich gefreut, alles zu sehen und dabei zu sein 🐶🎉

Jetzt bin ich natürlich wieder komplett platt und werde mich erstmal ausruhen 💤

Bis bald, euer Finni 🐶

#Boxerpuppy #Boxerdog #GermanBoxer #Hundeschau #LGAusstellung

events.captionPreview:
Hallo Freunde 🐾

Man was für ein aufregender Tag! 😄
Heute sind wir ganz früh nach Offenburg zur CACIB gefahren – also zu einer großen Ausstellung 🐕🏆

Wir waren sogar direkt die erste Gruppe, die d
events.fullCaption:
Hallo Freunde 🐾

Man was für ein aufregender Tag! 😄
Heute sind wir ganz früh nach Offenburg zur CACIB gefahren – also zu einer großen Ausstellung 🐕🏆

Wir waren sogar direkt die erste Gruppe, die dran war. Ich war ganz schön aufgeregt, überall waren Hunde, Menschen und neue Gerüche 🙈 Aber ich habe mich richtig angestrengt und am Ende ein „Vorzüglich“ bekommen ✨ zwar keine Platzierung aber für die erste Ausstellung ist das echt in Ordnung ☺️

Mama sagt, sie ist mega stolz auf mich, weil ich das echt super gemacht habe. Das macht mich natürlich auch richtig stolz 🐶💛

Jetzt liegen wir gemütlich im Hotel, ruhen uns aus und lassen den Abend ganz entspannt ausklingen 💤 Morgen geht’s nämlich weiter – wir sind schon ganz gespannt, was uns erwartet.

Drückt mir die Pfoten für morgen! 🐾

Bis bald, euer Finni 🐶

#Boxerdog #GermanBoxer #Hundeschau #CACIB #Offenburg

events.fullCaption:

events.fullCaption:
Our annual list is here! Have you picked out your tree!?🎄✨🎄 Christmas tree farms and lots are now OPEN! We‘ll update the list of dog friendly places if we find more spots. Hope your pup helps sniff out a gooooood tree! 

[Last Updated 12/13/25]

• Mountain Valley Ranch, Ramona: precut, OPEN till 12/23 @mountain_valley_ranch 
• Peltzer Pines, Silverado: choose your tree and they will cut it for you, OPEN till 12/20 peltzerpines.com
• Julian Christmas Tree Ranch, Julian: precut, 78th season, OPEN @julianchristmastreer
• Frosty’s Forest, Yorba Linda, Chino Hills, Bakersfield: precut, OPEN @frostysforest 
• The Vineyard 1924, Fallbrook: precut, OPEN till 12/21 @thevineyard1924 
• Greenspot Farms, Mentone: pre-cut and cut your own, OPEN till 12/23 @greenspotfarm 
• Pine Tree Acres, Ramona: live-potted trees to plant at home or choose and cut (tools provided or they can help cut it for you), OPEN @pinetreeacresramona 
• Family Christmas Tree Farm, El Cajon: precut and choose and cut (tools provided or they can help cut it for you), OPEN @familychristmastreefarm 
• Mr. Jingles Christmas Trees, multiple locations in LA & San Diego: all locations OPEN now @mrjingleschristmastrees 
• Mr. Green Trees, Culver City: precut, OPEN till 12/23 @mrgreentrees 
• Highland Valley Christmas Tree Farm, Ramona: choose and cut (tools provided or they can help cut it for you), OPEN till 12/21
• Pumpkin City, Laguna Hills, Santa Ana, Rancho Santa Margarita: precut, OPEN till 12/24 @pumpkincityinc 

📷 @cappiethevizsla Xmas 2025 and very curious about our tree! #pickyourowntree #dogspickchristmastrees #dogfriendlysocal

Bring your pups along for a fu
events.fullCaption:
🐾 Calling all dog owners! 🐾
This year’s Kent Food Fest has an exciting new addition for our furry friends — introducing the Kent Dog Fest Area on Sunday 17th May! 🐶🎉
Bring your pups along for a fun-filled day on both days!) with: ✨ Free activities 🦴 Tasty treats 🥩 Nutrition stalls 🎓 Dog training & fun tricks sessions
And of course… our family-favourite dog competitions! 🏆
🐕 Categories include: • Curliest Coat • Waggiest Tail • Most Handsome Dog • Prettiest Bitch • Best Crossbreed • Best Trick • Best Fancy Dress / Best Dressed Dog • Dog Owner Lookalike • The Scruffiest Dog
🎪 We also have lots of incredible stalls lined up this year!
📩 Want to enter your dog? Email our events team at jayscottevents@gmail.com

events.captionPreview:
Season opener: unlocked. 🐾🎪

We went to our first dog show of the season this weekend and honestly? It just confirmed what we already knew…

There is dog shows… and then there’s Dogs Day Out at East
events.fullCaption:
Season opener: unlocked. 🐾🎪

We went to our first dog show of the season this weekend and honestly? It just confirmed what we already knew…

There is dog shows… and then there’s Dogs Day Out at East Worldham.

Don’t get me wrong, we’ll always show up for a field full of floofs. But this one? This one hits different.

✨ Huge open space (no sardine-tin vibes)
✨ Proper have-a-go activities that are actually run well
✨ Arena displays that you can actually see without standing on tiptoes
✨ Stalls you genuinely want to browse (and overspend at)
✨ Relaxed, friendly atmosphere where you’re not queueing for 45 minutes for everything

And the setting at East Worldham is just chef’s kiss. Rolling countryside, space for zoomies, and enough room for reactive or nervous dogs to feel comfortable too.

After one show this weekend we looked at each other like… “Yeah. Dogs Day Out is still the one.”

If you’re planning your dog event calendar, trust us — book this one. You’ll leave sun-kissed (or rain-blessed), skint, and ridiculously happy. Just how a dog day should end.

🎟 Use code JETT10 for money off your tickets.

You coming… or are we saving you a spot on the field? 🐕💨

#DogsDayOut
#EastWorldham
#UKDogEvents
#HampshireDogs
#GermanShepherdMix

events.captionPreview:
Um dia especial, cheio de alegria, patinhas e boas energias 🐾✨

O nosso Cãocurso Solidário foi muito mais do que um evento — foi um momento de partilha, diversão e ligação entre tutores e os seus pat
events.fullCaption:
Um dia especial, cheio de alegria, patinhas e boas energias 🐾✨

O nosso Cãocurso Solidário foi muito mais do que um evento — foi um momento de partilha, diversão e ligação entre tutores e os seus patudos. Entre desfiles, obstáculos e muitos sorrisos, vivemos uma tarde incrível que não vamos esquecer.

Esta iniciativa teve um propósito solidário, com a recolha de alimentação que reverte a favor da Associação Nova Esperança Animal @nova_esperanca_animal contribuindo para o cuidado e bem-estar de animais que mais precisam 💛

Um agradecimento especial à Fluffy @fluffypetcare.pt pelo apoio e confiança ao longo desta iniciativa.

Contámos também com a presença do Sabor Caseiro @saborcaseiro_eventos que ajudou a tornar este dia ainda mais acolhedor.

Um obrigado ao Miguel do @wagb.studio , pelo registo fotográfico profissional dos nossos patudos, com sessões individuais cheias de personalidade 📸🐶

A Maggie destacou-se ao longo das provas e conquistou o primeiro lugar desta edição 🏆🐶

Obrigado a todos os que participaram e fizeram parte deste dia tão bonito 💛

#concursodecães #concursodeobstaculos #concursocanino #concursodebelezadecaes #cãocurso

events.fullCaption:
Vous m’avez demandé plus de photos en expositions canines, chose due chose faite ! 

Ce soir nous préparons les affaires et demain matin c’est départ pour la Nationale d’élevage du berger belge en Belgique 🇧🇪 

La juge est britannique ! 

J’ai hâte d’y être, c’est une première pour nous la Belgique ! Nous avons 9h de route pour y aller. Un sacré voyage mais ça en vaut la peine ! 
Ce qui me plaît dans les expositions c’est aussi d’avoir un regard extérieur et nouveau sur mon chien, suivre l’évolution des jugements… 

Je vous ferai suivre notre aventure 🤞🏻on croise les doigts pour de beaux résultats ! 

📸 : international dog show Chalon en Champagne - février 2025 
Ce jour là Tercann fera 1er excellent -CACS/CACIB & BEST OF BREED
BEST OF GROUP 1

events.captionPreview:
Coucou tout le monde ! 👋
On est début mai, le soleil pointe enfin le bout de son nez et avec lui... le retour des fameux "Espigaous" ! 🌾

Je ne sais pas pour vous, mais lors de mes repérages cette s
events.fullCaption:
Coucou tout le monde ! 👋
On est début mai, le soleil pointe enfin le bout de son nez et avec lui... le retour des fameux "Espigaous" ! 🌾

Je ne sais pas pour vous, mais lors de mes repérages cette semaine, j'ai vu qu'ils commençaient déjà à pointer le bout de leur nez. Ils ne sont pas encore tout à fait secs, mais c'est justement là qu'ils sont les plus traîtres : ils se détachent facilement et se faufilent partout sans qu'on s'en rende compte !

Mon petit conseil d'amie (et de pet-sitter 😉) :
N’attendez pas que l’herbe soit totalement jaune pour checker vos loulous. En ce moment, ils sont encore un peu verts et se cachent bien dans le pelage.

Chez Gin & Co Pets, j'ai déjà instauré le "rituel papouilles-check" :
Dès qu'on finit une balade, c'est inspection obligatoire ! Entre les coussinets, dans les oreilles, sous les aisselles... on ne laisse passer aucun voyageur clandestin. 🕵️‍♀️

Et vous, vous en avez déjà croisé sur vos chemins habituels ?

📍 Secteur : Puyricard, Venelles, Éguilles

 #puyricard #venelles #eguilles #baladecanine #gin&copets

events.fullCaption:
✨ Esmée, notre jolie Berger Allemand, est repartie ce matin après un petit séjour express commencé hier… et quel bonheur de la retrouver ! 🐾

Cette fois-ci, elle était beaucoup plus à l’aise et a retrouvé ses copains comme si elle n’était jamais partie 🐶💛

Au programme de ses vacances :
🎾 Des parties de jeux endiablées avec toute la bande 
🤗 De gros câlins bien mérités 
🌿 De belles balades avec la meute, même sous quelques gouttes de pluie 
💦 Un petit tour par la piscine de la pension 
… et surtout 😄 
🟤 SA grande passion : la fameuse flaque de boue dans laquelle elle a adoré plonger et se rouler sans modération !

Un vrai bonheur de la voir s’épanouir autant à chaque visite 🥰 On a déjà hâte de la revoir !

#LesAmisDeSnoopy #BergerAllemand #VieDeChien #PensionCanine #ChiensHeureux #JeuxEntreChiens #BaladeCanine #AmourDesChiens #BouillasseParty #DogLovers #DogLife #VacancesPourChiens

𝕃𝕖 𝕓𝕠𝕟𝕙𝕖𝕦𝕣 𝕟'𝕖𝕤𝕥 𝕡𝕒𝕤 𝕒𝕦 𝕓𝕠𝕦𝕥 𝕕𝕦 𝕔𝕙𝕖𝕞𝕚𝕟, 𝕚𝕝 𝕖𝕤𝕥 𝕝𝕖 𝕔𝕙𝕖𝕞𝕚𝕟
On court souvent après "l'après" : après le travail, après le sport, après les corvées... on attend
events.fullCaption:
𝕃𝕖 𝕓𝕠𝕟𝕙𝕖𝕦𝕣 𝕟'𝕖𝕤𝕥 𝕡𝕒𝕤 𝕒𝕦 𝕓𝕠𝕦𝕥 𝕕𝕦 𝕔𝕙𝕖𝕞𝕚𝕟, 𝕚𝕝 𝕖𝕤𝕥 𝕝𝕖 𝕔𝕙𝕖𝕞𝕚𝕟
On court souvent après "l'après" : après le travail, après le sport, après les corvées... on attend le repos pour enfin commencer à vivre. Pourtant, le moment présent est le seul moment où nous sommes vivants.
En transformant chaque action — même la balade sous la pluie ou la préparation du repas — en un acte choisi et non subi, on ne "perd" plus son temps, on l'habite. Moins de hâte, plus de présence : c'est là que se trouve la véritable sérénité. 🙏❤️

#PleineConscience #VivreLeMomentPresent #Serenite #BaladeCanine #SlowLife

💡INUMADO MEETとは？

events.fullCaption:
🙋‍♀️EVENT🐾REPORT

今回は3月24日(火)に実施した出張INUMADO MEETの様子お届け🐕🏞️

📝 https://inumado.com/extraedition_03/

————————

💡INUMADO MEETとは？

東京✖️犬の情報サイト@dog_tokyo_inunomadoguchi が運営する“あそび”を通して犬を学ぶをテーマにしたイベントを開催しているコミュニティ

【　特徴🐾　】
✅プロと一緒にあそべる
山歩きやSUP、川遊びなどそのフィールドや遊びを知っているプロと一緒に遊べます。
犬との外遊びは予期せぬトラブルに巻き込まれることも。
講義を通して、新しい学びや成長に繋がります。

✅犬同士の交流をサポート
INUMADO MEETの代表であり、元ドッグトレーナーの片寄もイベントに同行します。
初めての場所や犬に不安になるのは当然です。
犬や人が嫌な経験を積まないように、サポートします。

✅少ない人数で濃い時間を
イベントは10頭前後を定員としています。
少ない人数だからこそ、参加者さんやプロとの時間も濃いものに。
趣味の合う犬友と出会って、趣味の世界を広げましょう！

【　３つの約束🫶　】
・人だけが楽しいイベントは行いません。
・犬同士を無理に交流させません。
・初めてのチャレンジを応援します。
　
INUMADO MEETはさまざまな”プロ”をゲストに招き、
犬たちが大好きな「自然あそび」ができる場を提供します。

新しい事にチャレンジしたい人はもちろん 犬のスキを発見したい人 価値観の合う犬友が欲しい人も大歓迎

ここは「犬に愛されるアナタ」になれる場所です。

イベント日程はInstagramまたは、公式LINEへ！
@dog_tokyo_inunomadoguchi

#ドッグアウトドアイベント #犬とアウトドア #犬と山登り #犬のイベント #アウトドアイベント

events.fullCaption:
＜メール送信のお知らせ＞

先ほど以下の内容でメールをお送りいたしました。
どうぞご確認くださいませ。

＜以下、メールの内容＞

エクストリーム事務局からのお知らせ
260503号

このメールは、過去にエクストリーム関連イベントにご参加の皆様にお送りしております。
不要の方は返信にてその旨お伝えくださいませ。

今回のご案内は以下の３点です。

＝＝＝＝＝＝＝＝＝＝
（１）エクストリーム練習会in新潟　ご予約開始日時のお知らせ
（２）中部地区大会締め切り日のご案内
（３）グループレッスン、各地で開催！ご予約受付中！
＝＝＝＝＝＝＝＝＝＝

５月７日（木）１０：００、
エクストリーム練習会in新潟のご予約のメールフォームが解放されます。
※いつもは水曜日解放ですが今回はＧＷの関係で木曜日となっております。
練習会in新潟のご予約メールフォームはこちらです（10:00までは予告画面）。
https://ws.formzu.net/fgen/S97260769/

今回も先着順ではなく当日の10:00～17:00の間にメールをいただいた方の中で
抽選を行う形式ですので、急ぐ必要はありません。

抽選は今回もエクセルのランダム関数を使用して並び替え行います。
定員内に入れなかったワンちゃんはその並び替えの結果のままキャンセル待ち登録となります。
総合、ハイスピード共に、現在決勝の権利を持っていないワンちゃん優先となります。
※中部地区大会で決勝の権利を得たワンちゃんはリストの最後に回されますので、キャンセル待ちとなる可能性があることご了承くださいませ。
※今回は朝霧の練習会開催前のご予約開始ですので、練習会の参加履歴での優先は無しとなっております。

＜今回から以下のルールを追加いたしました＞
※同居犬であっても抽選後に権利の入れ替えはできません。

なお、同日17:00を過ぎましてもメールフォームは残りますが、
17:00以降に送信の方は抽選の結果のリストに受信順で加えられていきます。

結果の発表は、５月８日（金）中までに一覧表の公開にて発表予定です。

－－－－－－－－－－

（２）中部地区大会締め切り日のご案内

５月７日（木）は、中部地区大会の締め切り日となっております。
中部地区大会ご参加ご希望の皆様は、
５月７日（木）の１７：００までにお手続きを済ませていただきますようお願いいたします。

練習会のみの方も事前入金となりますのでお忘れなくお手続きをお願いいたします。

－－－－－－－－－－

（３）グループレッスン、各地で開催！ご予約受付中！

各地でグループレッスンを開催いたします。
初心者の方でご参加ご希望の方はこの機会をお見逃しなく！
また、エクストリームを始めてみたい！というお知り合いの方がいらっしゃいましたらぜひご紹介ください。

５月４日（月祝）５日（火祝）グループレッスンｉｎ丹後（京都）　※事前ご予約終了
５月２３日（土）２４日（日）グループレッスンｉｎしっぽフェスタ（東京）
５月３０日（土）３１日（日）グループレッスンｉｎ等々力（神奈川）

こちらのメールフォーム一覧からご希望の開催をご予約ください。
https://www.doglifeplan.jp/ex-mail/postmail.html

丹後は当日エントリーも空きがあれば可能です。
現在まだまだ空きがございますので下記説明書をダウンロードの上ぜひご参加ください。
https://www.doglifeplan.jp/extreme/2026/260504-05tango-setsumei.pdf

－－－－－－－－－－

以上、よろしくお願いいたします。

4/26(日) 無事に鼻ぺちゃ会終了しました〜☺️

events.fullCaption:
🐶第1回  鼻ぺちゃ会🐶
4/26(日) 無事に鼻ぺちゃ会終了しました〜☺️
人間18名様
ワンコ15犬様

ワンコ内訳↓↓↓
ボステリ3頭
パグ6頭
フレブル5頭+つき
⁡
初めてお会いする方々もたくさん
いらっしゃり、みなさんで鼻ぺちゃの
交流会が出来て嬉しかったです🥹
⁡
みなさまにlunchを食べていただき、ワンコ達もご飯やおやつを💕その後はラン🐾へ移動
当日、天気予報が雨模様ではなくなった為、
朝から15m走の用意をしました‼️
鼻ぺちゃの15m走❣️優勝は……
ボステリのマシューくん😍2.70秒でした👏速い〜☺️
(動画は別にのせますね☘️)
⁡
その後は少しラン🐾をして、店内へ
デザートを食べながら、ビンゴ大会‼️
大当たり3個(大大当たりが1つあり！！！)
中当たり6個
小当たり9個
⁡
私も久しぶりにビンゴ大会しましたが、
めっちゃ楽しかったです🤣
⁡
途中、リーチにならない人むけに
ミッションを用意してましたが、
なんとみなさんリーチ中の方ばかりでした(笑)
なので残りお二方！となった時にミッション遂行🫡
愛犬にお座りをさせ、お手でもふせでも良いのでさせる！
ということでしたが、なんと2頭とも
お座りはしないけど芸はする。
お座りはするけど芸はしない。
とめちゃくちゃ私達を楽しませてくれました🤣🤣🤣
⁡
どちらもタッチやお座りができたので、OKとしましたよー🤭💕
⁡
⁡

3時間半という時間がアッという間でした🥰
初めてのオフ会的なイベントを
無事に終えることができて、安心しております☺️
本日ご参加くださったみなさま、ワンコちゃん達
本当にありがとうございました🥰
バタバタしてばかりで、うまく進行もできずでしたが、
可愛い可愛い愛犬達に癒され、
普段見られない愛犬さんの姿(15m走で走る姿とか🥹)が見られて、
わたしはまた感動しっぱなしでした😭❤️
みんなよく頑張りましたー🐶🐾✨️
飼い主様達も本当にありがとうございました☺️💕
⁡
ゆっくりお話しが出来なかったかもしれません😣
鼻ぺちゃ同士、色んなお話ができたらなと思いましたが、
時間が足らなかったかも⁉️ですね🥺
今後、どこかで皆様がお会いすることがあるときに
またこの日を思い出してくださったら
嬉しいです☺️
ワンコ達もみんな、お疲れ様ー🥰
⁡
⁡
これからも色んな犬種で『わちゃわちゃ会』が
できたらいいなと思っています😌💫
⁡
⁡
フレブル会
鼻ぺちゃ会の次回は秋以降の寒くなってきたかな？
くらいに開催しましょー😍😍😍
⁡
⁡
 #kuupupu #kuupupu_cafe  #鼻ぺちゃ会 #店内犬ok  #ワンコイベント

,

events.fullCaption:
Mein Schatz
,
ein neues Jahr beginnt – und ich kann mir nichts Schöneres vorstellen, als es an deiner Seite zu starten. Wenn ich auf das vergangene Jahr zurückblicke, sehe ich so viele Momente, die mich zum Lächeln bringen, so viele Erinnerungen, die mein Herz wärmen, und so viele Augenblicke, in denen mir bewusst wurde, wie unglaublich dankbar ich bin, dich zu haben. Du bist für mich nicht nur Liebe, sondern auch Zuhause, Ruhe, Lachen und Hoffnung zugleich.

📸 @pinkstertoby 💝

#PupPlay #PupCommunity #PupLife #PupEvent #Nürnberg

events.fullCaption: The secret is out! We’ve been working on a special project with PuppyJam NYC, and we’re so excited to announce our very first Kitty Jam event! events.fullCaption:
🐾 BARK-IT LIST #034: Rockefeller Park, New York 🐾⁠
⁠
Hello from New Yorkie City for this week's Bark-It List! If you're a new pup here, our Bark It List is a collection of our furvorite two paws up dog friendly things to do across the country.⁠
⁠
Meet Rockefeller Park 🗽 This pawsome dog park features public artwork with a beautiful Hudson River backdrop⁠
⁠
This gem has everything you and your pup would need...plenty of paths for your pup to sniff around, a pavilion, and even public art exhibits!⁠
⁠
✅ And pro tip for your visit? Be sure to trot over to The Lily Pool! ⁠
⁠
🔗 Is your tail wagging for more? Click the link in bio!⁠

It’s the amazing Chesterfield Canine Society Premier Open Show tomorrow!

If you’re coming along, keep an eye out for your judges proudly wearing their brand new name
events.fullCaption:
Exhibitors, are you ready? 🐾💙

It’s the amazing Chesterfield Canine Society Premier Open Show tomorrow!

If you’re coming along, keep an eye out for your judges proudly wearing their brand new name badges 👀

Don’t forget the all-important 3 Cs:
💙Chairs – none are provided, so bring your own!
💙 Cash – we’ve got an amazing raffle and even better food service. Card payments won’t be available, so bring plenty of coins and notes 💷
💙 Cups – bring your own cup or travel mug and enjoy tea or coffee for just £1 ☕ (limited paper cups available)

Have an amazing day, good luck in the ring 🍀, and fingers crossed the weather is kind to us!☀️

Most importantly… enjoy every moment! 🐶✨

Our premium shell jackets are a must-have for busy dog show exhibitors across
events.fullCaption:
Happy hump day people🙌 ive not stopped this week🌪️

Stay show-ready whatever the British weather throws at you 🌧️🐾☀️

Our premium shell jackets are a must-have for busy dog show exhibitors across the UK — designed to keep the wind out and you dry during those unpredictable show days, without the bulk slowing you down when you’re with your dogs.

Available in a wide range of colours and sizes, you can stay comfortable and look the part. This featured jacket has been beautifully embroidered in metallic gold thread, adding that extra touch of class and sparkle — perfect for standing out while still keeping it practical.

🛒 https://www.evolveprinting.co.uk/ourshop/prod_8250157-Soft-Shell-Jackets-Gilets.html

events.captionPreview:
We’re proud to showcase this stunning embroidery work for the Curly Coated Retriever Association 🐾

Using their current logo, we digitised an updated image to bring it to life in thread—and just look
events.fullCaption:
We’re proud to showcase this stunning embroidery work for the Curly Coated Retriever Association 🐾

Using their current logo, we digitised an updated image to bring it to life in thread—and just look at the result. The level of detail speaks for itself: the depth of stitching, the subtle light and shade, and those eyes with a real sparkle… it’s all captured beautifully.

This is exactly why expert digitising matters. The team have done a fantastic job here, turning a photo into something truly special—and always worth every penny.

Now that the logo has been digitised, it opens the door for use across a wide range of garments and products moving forward.

Thank you once again to the Curly Coated Retriever Association for your order🤎

🎊Hoy celebramos a quienes llenan nuestros corazones de amor, alegría
events.fullCaption:
¡Feliz Día de la Madre a todas esas mamás increíbles que también son mamás de sus hijos de 4 patas🐶🐱🐔🐷🐭🐻🐧🦄🐗🐠🦖🐑🐐💖 ….

🎊Hoy celebramos a quienes llenan nuestros corazones de amor, alegría y ternura, tanto con sus hijos humanos como con sus mascotas. 

❤️Gracias por ser ejemplo de cariño incondicional y por compartir su amor con todos los seres que las rodean. 

¡Que tengan un día lleno de mimos, abrazos y mucho amor! 

🌄🐾 ¡Únete a nuestra comunidad de amantes de la montaña y los perros! 

🐾🌄¿Te apasiona la naturaleza y compartir aventuras con tu peludo?

 ¡Entonces nuestro Club de Montaña con Perros es el lugar perfecto para ti y tu compañer@de4 patas! 🐶❤️

🏞️ ¿Qué ofrecemos?

- Excursiones regulares a los mejores senderos.

- Técnicos Deportivos de Montaña y profesionales del mundo del perro.

-Actividades, talleres y formación sobre cuidado y entrenamiento de perros.

- Un ambiente amigable y acogedor donde hacer nuevos amigos (humanos y caninos).

 ¡Y mucho más⛰️!

🌟 Beneficios de ser socio:

- Acceso a rutas exclusivas y eventos especiales.

- Descuentos en tiendas de mascotas y equipamiento de montaña.

- La oportunidad de formar parte de una comunidad que comparte tu pasión por la naturaleza y los animales.

✨ ¡No te quedes fuera! 

Si buscas nuevas aventuras y quieres que tu perro también disfrute de la montaña, 
¡Este es tu momento!

📩 Contáctanos para más información y únete a nuestra próxima salida. 

🌐 www.canyoncan.es 
📞 +34 699 334 955
📧aaac_canyoncan@hotmail.com

¡Te esperamos con los brazos abiertos y las colas moviéndose 🐕🏔️

#ClubDeMontaña #AventurasConPerros #Naturaleza #Senderismoconperros #PerrosFelices ÚneteANosotros
 DíaDeLaMadre AmorIncondicional MamáYMascotas felízdíadelamadre

events.fullCaption:
¿Tu perro es el rey absoluto de la galería de tu móvil pero tú casi nunca sales con él? 🐶📱

Son uno más de la familia, de eso no hay duda, pero a veces se nos olvida que también merecemos tener recuerdos bonitos y de calidad junto a ellos. Ahora que ha llegado la primavera, los días son más largos y los bosques de Sant Cugat están preciosos, es el momento perfecto para ponerle solución.

🌿 Cero posados, 100% diversión, juegos y paseos al aire libre.

En el blog te he dejado una guía rápida de por qué esta es la mejor época para vuestra sesión con mascotas y qué 4 cositas necesitas traer. ¡Tienes el link directo en mi bio! 👇

On vous donne rendez-vous le 30 mai 2026, de 11h à 19h, pour une journée 90% dédiée aux chiens… oui parce qu’on parlera
events.fullCaption:
🐾 @eviland.fr revient… et on avait beaucoup trop hâte de vous l’annoncer ! 🥹

On vous donne rendez-vous le 30 mai 2026, de 11h à 19h, pour une journée 90% dédiée aux chiens… oui parce qu’on parlera aussi un peu félin ! ✨

Mais tout est prévu pour amuser nos chiens, et il va y avoir de quoi faire : 
🐕 de l’agility, du canicross, du dog dancing ;
💆‍♀️ du bien-être avec des séances d’ostéo
🎯 le Tetrifit pour tester plein d’activités avec votre chien, et mieux comprendre comment le dépenser
📸 des animations fun : photobooth, ateliers, piscine… 

Bref, une journée pour partager, découvrir, s’amuser… et créer un moment convivial avec son chien. 🐾

Et on vous prépare aussi quelques surprises… 👀

👉 Le programme complet est déjà dispo ici (en avant-première 😉) : LIEN EN BIO
Ne tardez pas, certaines activités sont sur réservation !

On a déjà hâte de vous voir, soyez vigilants, les premiers créneaux pour certaines activités, vont bientôt sortir.

events.captionPreview:
La liberté, c’est un privilège !

Chien réactif, prédateur, qui n’a pas conscience du danger, qui ne peux pas s’empêcher d’aller gentiment embêter les autres…

Dans un monde d’humains comme le notre,
events.fullCaption:
La liberté, c’est un privilège !

Chien réactif, prédateur, qui n’a pas conscience du danger, qui ne peux pas s’empêcher d’aller gentiment embêter les autres…

Dans un monde d’humains comme le notre, pas tout les chiens peuvent se balader en liberté. La bonne nouvelle, c’est que la liberté n’est pas obligatoire pour faire une bonne balade !

La longe est l’outil idéal pour balader son chien, lui donner de l’espace, le laisser explorer et renifler son environnement tout en gardant tout le monde en sécurité !

#dog #dogfriendly #PetSitter #BaladeCanine #GardeAnimaux #BienEtreAnimal #ChiensHeureux #SaintGaudens #Lannemezan #HauteGaronne #Occitanie

events.fullCaption:
2026.5.3🎪🐕
⁡
石川へワンワンダフルフェスタ行ってきたよ❣️
@wanwonderful_festa 
⁡
まるちゃんが前の日から旅行に来てたよ💗
イベント前に、お散歩🐶
相変わらずワンワンうっさいふうだけど
何となく仲良く散歩���て���ね🤣
まるちゃんいい笑顔で可愛い😁
ふうと色味が似てて、笑った顔も似てて
まるちゃん、ふうの縮小版みたいな🤭
⁡
イツメンのみんなも集まって、
撮影会📸🤣
イベント前にだいぶ満足してたね笑
⁡
入ってすぐあった、
KILONINERさん❣️今日の目的で、
早速サイズ合わせしたりして、買ってしまった🥰
⁡
目的果たしちゃったから、そのあとはほぼ撮影会(笑)
⁡
つむぎちゃんとオソロのうさ耳パッチン💗
⁡
たくさんの柴ちゃんにも会ったよー👍
⁡
イベント満喫した後は、ランチ😋🍴💕
お店へ移動中に、速攻爆睡のふう😅
⁡
お店は、ハンバーガー屋さん🍔
⁡
お店がオシャレ✨で、テラスも広くてのんびり🙌
ハンバーガー、ほうれん草いっぱい入ったやつにして、めちゃウマやったー😆︎💕︎
けど、どんどん天気悪くなってきて、
強風🌀で、テラスの屋根の幕がガタガタ、机の上のものも飛んでいきそうで、のんびり話して居られなくなるくらい💦わんこ達はソワソワ😅
なのに、飼い主たちはドリンクおかわりして(おかわり自由だったので)喋ってたね🤣🤣🤣
けど、本格的な雨になる前にお開き😅
⁡
帰りも速攻、爆睡してたふうでした😴😴😴笑
⁡
みんなで楽しく過ごせて良い休みになった︎💕︎
まるちゃん、ルテちゃん、凪ちゃん、そらまる君、茶々丸君、つむぎちゃん、
みんなありがとうーー🙏🥰💗
またまたいっぱい貰ってしまって🙇‍♀️
初めましてだったわんちゃん達も写真一緒に撮ってもらってありがとうございました🩷
⁡
#ポメ柴#ポメ柴友達#柴友達#犬のイベント#kiloninerpets

events.fullCaption:
☆
だいすけですっ(⁠・⁠∀⁠・⁠)

5月2日㈯
わんこフェスタin富岡に行ってきたよ〜☀

④⑤着いて早々にご近所さんに会いました😃
久しぶりに会ったらわんこ増えてた😆😆
くまちゃんとロンくん😄

⑥⑦ @com.bety さんでお買い物♪
看板犬のはなちゃんとコウくん
お写真ご一緒ありがとう😄
⑧くまさんポシェットとネクタイ👔
買ってもらったワン🐶♪
黄色いくまさん🐻かわいい🤗

⑨⑩⑪高級アイスを食べたりフライドポテト専門店のポテトを食べたりして😋
⑫おやつをたくさん調達しました🤭

⑬そして抽選会でお散歩バルーンもらいました🤩
好きな子を選んで連れて帰れます😆
手前で存在感を放っていたぶーちゃん🐷にしました♡

そのぶーちゃんとお散歩動画を撮りたかったのですが😂
なにせ強風で🌀
ぶーちゃん制御不能🤣

⑭撮った写真が面白かったので繋いで動画にしました😂
⑮〜⑱ 動画がママちゃんツボでして😂
あとで見返して楽しみたいがために編集🤣
お時間ありましたらご覧ください🤣🤣
一つ前のリールと一部被ります😝

⑲翌日のだいすけとぶーちゃんの様子
仲良しさん😄
…というか、だいすけには見えていないのかな😂😂

強風だしちょっと暑かったけど楽しかった〜🙌
公園綺麗だし今度お散歩に行こうかな😄
*
*
#わんこフェスタin富岡
#わんこイベント
#お散歩バルーン
#お散歩ぶーちゃん
#スピプー

events.captionPreview:
At Luxycoat, Switzerland, breed-specific grooming is our standard and priority. ✂️

For Cocker Spaniels, we focus on precise trimming rather than shaving the undercoat, preserving the natural texture
events.fullCaption:
At Luxycoat, Switzerland, breed-specific grooming is our standard and priority. ✂️

For Cocker Spaniels, we focus on precise trimming rather than shaving the undercoat, preserving the natural texture and health of their fur. 

We avoid a machine-cut or scissors approach in the areas where hand stripping/trimming is required (backs, noses, etc.). 

We provide extra care for sensitive areas like ears and paws— where matting and irritation are most common.

We shape and guide the coat so it grows naturally, in true harmony with the breed’s lifestyle. 

We use specific breed products that keep pet's coat silky and shiny for a while. 🐾

Book your appointment today:
📅 https:/luxycoat.wixsite.com/booking
📩 DM @luxycoat
📲 Call/SMS/WhatsApp us at +41 76 705 50 65

We have ABOs!
300 CHF: for 4 appointements / annually.
450 CHF: unlimited appointments/ annually.

🌱 Visit Our Website: https:/luxycoat.wixsite.com/home
🐾 Join our WhatsApp community: Luxy Coat
🎉 Join us on LinkedIn: LuxyCoat

events.fullCaption:
Salut les friends 🐾

Moi c’est Kenya, je suis une Berger Australien femelle de 6 ans. J’adore les belles balades, j’adore l’eau, et j’adore apprendre des nouvelles choses ! J’adore aussi jouer et me faire des nouveaux amis 🐶

Je suis une chienne dynamique, joyeuse, joueuse et très sociale. J’aime tous les humains et tous les chiens, peu importe leur âge, leur taille, leur genre. Je suis un berger et j’aime réunir 🤎

Tu veux être mon friend ?

Notre objectif : des balades et une éducation respectueuses, basées sur la confiance, l
events.fullCaption:
🐾 Bienvenue chez Kenya & Friends !

Ici, nous plaçons la relation entre le chien et sa famille au cœur de tout.
Notre objectif : des balades et une éducation respectueuses, basées sur la confiance, la compréhension et le bien-être émotionnel de chaque chien.

Nos services : • Balades récréatives en petit groupe, ~ 1h • Balades éducatives (avec ou sans maître), ~ 1h • Pension familiale, dans un cadre sécurisé et bienveillant

🐶 Chaque chien est accueilli comme un membre de la famille, avec une approche adaptée à ses besoins et à son rythme.

Contactez-nous par WhatsApp ou par e-mail (infos dans le post) pour organiser une première balade-test.

📍 Nyon et région

events.fullCaption:
Včerejší socializační výlet? Totální pecka 😍🌿🐕‍🦺
Užili jsme si to my i naši psí parťáci na maximum.
I když nás nebylo moc, o to víc to stálo za to – smích, 10 km v nohách a terén, co fakt nebyl pro padavky 😄 Balvany, brodění řeky, kořeny… ale zvládli jsme všechno 💪
Nechyběly svačiny pro nás ani pro chlupáče 🐾 dokonce si cestou dali i tvaroh 😄
A co je nejvíc? Byli naprosto úžasní a krásně spolu vycházeli ❤️🐶

Došli jsme na vyhlídku, mrkli na zříceninu a nechybělo ani malé pivko 🍻
Počasí jak na objednávku, sluníčko a spokojenost na všech stranách ☀️

Příště se přidej i ty 😉🐾
👉 Dej like, sdílej a pošli dál všem pejskařům, co by do toho šli s námi 💛

#socializacnivylety #zeleznehory #doglovers #doglife #dogday

events.captionPreview:
Not every “dog-friendly” plan is actually right for your dog.

Especially in spring, when stimulation levels in NYC are naturally higher.

More people, more dogs, more noise, more movement.

Choosing
events.fullCaption:
Not every “dog-friendly” plan is actually right for your dog.

Especially in spring, when stimulation levels in NYC are naturally higher.

More people, more dogs, more noise, more movement.

Choosing the right environment makes all the difference.

Some dogs thrive in social, high-energy spaces.
Others need calmer, more predictable experiences.

Understanding that difference helps prevent:
• overstimulation
• reactivity
• difficulty settling later

Which one sounds like your dog?

Share this with someone planning their May with their dog 🐾

#NYCDogs #AstoriaDogs #DogFriendlyNYC #DogParents #DogBehavior

NOTICIÓN!!!!!!!! 📢🐕😜

Si tienes un perro, que sepas que el juego es la herramienta más potente que tienes para conectar con él. 

Por eso hemos preparado con muchisima ilusión el seminario “El Pode
events.fullCaption:
NOTICIÓN!!!!!!!! 📢🐕😜

Si tienes un perro, que sepas que el juego es la herramienta más potente que tienes para conectar con él. 

Por eso hemos preparado con muchisima ilusión el seminario “El Poder del Juego”. 
Lo impartirá Albert Garriga (@pastorsdasfalt ) a quien conocemos desde hace muchísimos años. Es un referente del mundo canino formando a guías y profesionales.

🫵¿Por qué debes apuntarte?

Aprendizaje real: Construirás una relación potente con tu perro.

Adiós al estrés: Aprenderás a evitar que el juego genere obsesión, frustración o ansiedad. 

Mejor comunicación: Entenderás a comunicarte mejor con tu perro.

Menos conflictos: Conseguirás más recursos técnicos y estratégicos para tu día a día. 

Autonomía: Aprenderás un sistema para que puedas aplicarlo tú solo en casa. 

Detalles del seminario

📅 Fecha: Fin de semana del 30 y 31 de mayo. 

Sábado: de 9:00 a 18:00 h.

Domingo: de 9:00 a 13:00 h.

📍 Ubicación: Residencia Dog Welfare Barcelona. Estaremos al aire libre y tendremos un espacio para los perros; seremos varios profesionales para atenderlos y procurar que estén bien en todo momento. 

⚠️ ¡SOLO HAY 8 PLAZAS CON PERRO. También puedes venir sin perro y aplicar luego todo lo aprendido en tu casa.

Para reservar la plaza envíanos un mail a boncan@boncan.com

#seminarioeducacioncanina #seminario #educacioncanina #eventocanino #barcelona

𝑫𝒆𝒔𝒑𝒖𝒆́𝒔 𝒅𝒆 ④ 𝒂𝒏̃𝒐𝒔 𝒔𝒊𝒏 𝒄𝒐𝒏𝒄𝒖𝒓𝒔𝒐𝒔, 𝒂𝒚𝒆𝒓 𝒗𝒐𝒍𝒗𝒊́.

events.fullCaption:
🐾 𝗚𝗿𝗮𝗻 𝗖𝗼𝗻𝗰𝘂𝗿𝘀𝗼 𝗖𝗮𝗻𝗶𝗻𝗼 𝗱𝗲 𝗹𝗮 𝗙𝗲𝗿𝗶𝗮

Como parte del marco de actividades de la Expo Feria Altotonga 2026, el Ayuntamiento de Altotonga  invita a la ciudadanía a participar en el Gran Concurso Canino de la Feria, fomentando la convivencia familiar y el cuidado responsable de nuestras mascotas. 🐕🐩

🗓️ Inscripciones gratuitas hasta el 22 de abril

📄 Requisitos:
✔️ Foto de la mascota
✔️ Nombre
✔️ Raza
✔️ Tamaño
✔️ Nombre del dueño
✔️ Teléfono de contacto

📍 Registro en oficinas de Tesorería
📲 Informes: 228 365 3199

🐶 Se recuerda que cada propietario es responsable del cuidado y manejo adecuado de su mascota durante el evento.

🙌 Participa y forma parte de esta actividad que promueve la sana convivencia y el respeto hacia los animales.

#Altotonga #ExpoFeriaAltotonga2026 #TransformandoJuntos #ConcursoCanino

events.captionPreview:
Llega a La Noria el Primer Concurso Canino Nacional 🐾

El próximo 10 de mayo el parking de La Noria se convierte en el punto de encuentro para los amantes de los perros para esta primera edición 🐶✨
events.fullCaption:
Llega a La Noria el Primer Concurso Canino Nacional 🐾

El próximo 10 de mayo el parking de La Noria se convierte en el punto de encuentro para los amantes de los perros para esta primera edición 🐶✨

📅 Inscripciones online abiertas hasta el 6 de mayo (23:45h) con precio reducido, que puedes hacer en el siguiente link https://sociedadcaninademurcia.es/concurso.php?id=87# 

📍 También podrás inscribirte el mismo día del concurso, de 9:00 a 10:30h

🔎 Importante tener en cuenta:
• Categoría de parejas y grupos de cría GRATIS (inscripción directa en el evento)
• Concurso con puntuación oficial para competiciones caninas como el Campeonato de la Comunidad de Murcia y SUPER TÍTULO de CAMPEÓN DE CAMPEONES.

🎁 Además, los ganadores podrán llevarse premios con sacos de comida de la marca Arion 

Un plan diferente para disfrutar en familia… ¡y con tu mejor amigo! 🐾💚

#LaNoriaOutlet #EventoMurcia #ConcursoCanino #Murcia #PlanFamiliar #DogLovers

events.fullCaption:
🎉 CONCOURS 🎉
Aujourd’hui nous fêtons les 1600 abonnés !! Pour l’occasion, Adès ainsi que 6 superbes créatrices ont décidé de vous offrir de super cadeaux !

6 LOTS, 6 GAGNANTS
1 • Un collier tick-out, répulsif naturel et stylé pour vos loulous, @abkt_gang_accessories 

2 • Un portrait de votre animal en format A5, @julie.et.sky 

3 • -30% sur une mini session photo, @luciefphoto 

4 • Un bandana et un chouchou assorti, @olivettecreations 

5 • Un bon d’achat de 10€, @karnidog.fr 

6 • Un porte-clé personnalisé de votre animal, @slice_of_humble_pie_ 

POUR PARTICIPER :
- Être abonné à chacune des boutiques partenaires ainsi qu’au compte d’Adès
- Like le poste
- Tag 3 amis potentiellement intéressés par le concours
- Partage en story en mentionnant tout les comptes

* Un commentaire = Une participation, donc pas de limitation par personne
* Participation pour chaque lots !

Bonne chance les copains 🤭 Le tirage au sort se fera le samedi 16 mai !

#concours #concourschien #chien #chiot #giveaway

🎉 NOUVEAUTÉ CHEZ DEBIE & CO

Nous avons le plaisir de vous inviter à notre cinquième rassemblement de race :
✨ COCKER PARTY – Joie, câlins et oreilles dans le vent au rendez-vous 🐶🤎

Un moment unique entre Cockers et humains, dans la bonne humeur et la convivialité !

📅 Samedi 30 mai 2026
🕘 De 09h30 à 13h00
📍 Lausanne (VD)
💰 CHF 35.- par chien

Au programme :
🌲 Balade en forêt
🥂 Apéritif convivial
🎾 Jeux dans le parc clôturé
🎁 Et un sac surprise pour chaque loulou

⚠️ Chiens sociaux uniquement
⚠️ Places limitées – inscription obligatoire

📲 Infos & réservations via WhatsApp

On se réjouit de partager ce moment avec vous et vos magnifiques Cockers 🐾

👉 Partage à tes amis propriétaires de Cockers – on vous attend nombreux !

events.fullCaption:
#代々木わんわんカーニバル2026 に行ってきたよ🫶✨
夏のお嬢さんスタイルで出発〜🍋💛

だいすきな @ezog_hokkaido さんのアキレスが本命だったのですが、
午前中で売り切れとのこと😭😭
こちらの鹿肉、トライプ、鹿骨、生ジャーキーを愛用中💓
この日も髄がたっぷりの鹿骨をいただきました🫶

あとのお目当てのシャンプーは初の @wafona_official さん。
香りが自然ですぐに消えるとのこと✨
はじめて使うのでレビューする！！
りゅい🐶✨にオールケアスプレーをプレゼント購入！！

あとは沖縄の給食屋さんに行って、
沖縄県で採れたマグロとカツオの無添加おやつゲット💓
カツオ食べてみたけど味と香りはしっかりなのに
塩気がほとんどなくて良さそう〜！！

以下骨はもうほぼしばき済み！

#犬イベント #犬イベント東京 #shnauzermini

events.captionPreview: 🇯🇵🇫🇷 ↓Currently studying dog communication and my favorite part so far is the love language. I always show them how much I love them (spoiled, guilty!), but now I'm trying to notice more how they
events.fullCaption:
🇯🇵🇫🇷 ↓Currently studying dog communication and my favorite part so far is the love language. I always show them how much I love them (spoiled, guilty!), but now I'm trying to notice more how they show me too. Them more silent, me more loud ^^
What's your dog's way of saying I love you?

現在犬のコミュニケーションを勉強していて、一番好きな部分は愛の言語。いつも彼らにどれだけ愛してるか示してる（甘やかしてる、認める！）けど、今は彼らも愛と信頼で私を甘やかす方法にもっと注意を払おうとしてる。
彼らは静か、私はうるさい — いつも簡単じゃない。でも辿り着いてる。
あなたの犬の「愛してる」の言い方は？

J'étudie la communication canine en ce moment et ma partie préférée, c'est le langage. Je leur montre toujours combien je les aime (gâtés pourris, coupable !), mais maintenant j'essaie de remarquer comment eux aussi me le montrent. Eux silencieux, moi bruyante ^^
Comment ton chien te dit qu'il t'aime ?

events.captionPreview:
Souvent, on transforme une balade en un moment d’éducation canine 🐾

Pourquoi est-ce une bonne idée ? 

1. Ce n’est pas toujours facile de trouver du temps pour travailler l’éducation canine - autant
events.fullCaption:
Souvent, on transforme une balade en un moment d’éducation canine 🐾

Pourquoi est-ce une bonne idée ? 

1. Ce n’est pas toujours facile de trouver du temps pour travailler l’éducation canine - autant rentabiliser les sorties quotidiennes !

2. C’est un moment agréable pour votre chien - il n’y a pas meilleur moyen pour que votre chien apprenne que lorsqu’il voit ceci comme quelque chose de sympa et ludique !

3. En balade, il y a plein de contextes et rencontres qui permettent de mettre en pratique ce qu’on travaille !

4. C’est un moment de communion entre vous et votre chien - travailler, tout comme partager une balade, renforce votre lien maître-chien ! 

#educationcanine #educationcaninesuisse #chien #chienssuisses #chiensnyon #baladecanine #educationcaninepositive

events.fullCaption:
Moments from March ☀️🐾 

1. The best season 🌼 
2. Scottish reservoir walks
3. Always time for a quick dip
4. Road trip to Surrey on bunny business 🐰@travelodgeuk 
5. A beautiful (if overcast) walk at Virginia Water
6. Tired of posing 🥱 
7. A delicious treat from @judesicecream 
8. Watching @crufts in the hotel room
9. My unofficial @crufts entry form. I would like it placed on record that the last bit is slander and I only did it one time. Okay, maybe twice. DEFINITELY no more than three times… Your Honour 👀
10. Meanwhile my best fren Meg actually WAS at @crufts for a second year, representing the Korthals Griffon breed. Go Meggy! #DiscoverDogs
11. Delicious pub lunch at @nagsheadonthames with my mamas and my grandpawrents
12. Super Saturday at @thespylawbar 🏉 
13. Me and my new fren Bilbo 😍 @ruth_reilly_music 
14. I went into work a lot with my mama in March while my other mama was doing jury service. I love getting fusses from all my @band_scots pals!
15. Me and my fren Doris the Collie
16. A trip to Portobello beach
17. My face when I discovered @the_dogport - what a fab little find
18. Meg turned five, happy birthday Meggy 🎈 
19. Over and out 💤

events.captionPreview: Fue terrible: estábamos sentados en el salón con unos amigos cuando, de repente, nuestra Roxy empezó a arrastrar el trasero descaradamente por el suelo delante de todos. 🐶 Nunca me había sentido tan
events.fullCaption:
Fue terrible: estábamos sentados en el salón con unos amigos cuando, de repente, nuestra Roxy empezó a arrastrar el trasero descaradamente por el suelo delante de todos. 🐶 Nunca me había sentido tan incómoda y avergonzada.
Así que pregunté a nuestro veterinario la razón de este comportamiento. Al parecer, los perros se arrastran para tratar de aliviar algún problema en el trasero: picor, irritación o dolor. Pobre Roxy, ¡debió de ser insoportable para ella! Me imaginé en su lugar y me sentí tan culpable de no haber empezado ningún tratamiento antes ☹ ¡Sólo podía empeorar!
Mi veterinario me recomendó un tratamiento digestivo para perros anti arrastre posterior como un remedio suave y natural para el scooting canino. Durante las dos semanas siguientes, vi ya las primeras mejoras - Roxy ya no se ocupaba de su parte trasera: ni le gustaba ni mordía. A veces se acercaba a la alfombra, pero ya no se arrastraba 👍
Compré el segundo bote de Tratamiento digestivo para perros anti arrastre posterior como medida preventiva para mantener el comportamiento mejorado de Roxy, pero no fue realmente necesario, ¡ya que nuestra Roxy se había recuperado completamente mientras tanto! 😊
con un sabroso sabor a pollo: www.amazon.es/dp/B09SYCMZPF
con un delicioso sabor a tocino: www.amazon.es/dp/B09SYB33TY
y sí, también visité la tienda GastroBalance para obtener apoyo digestivo adicional necesario para mi adorable perro: www.amazon.es/gastrobalance Disfruté de una entrega GRATIS 🎁¡Gracias @gastrobalance_es !

events.fullCaption:
Sorry, I wasn't aware about anal glands and their importance to my dog’s health. As long as my Charlie didn’t have any issues, I changed nothing to his diet. But one day, his anal glands became irritated and had to be treated at the Vet. The Vet mentioned it  was due to lack of fibre in my dog’s diet and suggested GastroBalance Anal Gland Health support to enable my dog’s anal glands to express naturally. Now I add it daily to my dog’s feed and have had no more issues since!

I highly recommend you use this product BEFORE your pet goes through the suffering that mine did, especially if they don’t get enough fibre! I can't say enough how great I feel this product is! It helped me sleep better and feel happier! Thanks to @gastrobalanceuk ! Impressive how a little soft chew can make such a miracle!

or with a tasty chicken flavour: www.amazon.es/dp/B09T29MK65

Just visit the GastroBalance store to find a premium natural supplement for your lovely dog : www.amazon.es/gastrobalance and enjoy a FREE delivery offered by Amazon 🎁

events.captionPreview: I still feel a little guilty thinking about it now… I honestly didn’t know how important fibre was for a dog’s tummy. Buddy always seemed fine, so I never thought twice about his diet. Then one day, I
events.fullCaption:
I still feel a little guilty thinking about it now… I honestly didn’t know how important fibre was for a dog’s tummy. Buddy always seemed fine, so I never thought twice about his diet. Then one day, I noticed he was uncomfortable and sore, and my heart just sank. Seeing him like that was really upsetting.

At the vet, I was told Buddy was constipated because he wasn’t getting enough fibre. The vet suggested GastroBalance to gently soften his stools and help his digestion get back to normal. I remember hoping so badly that it would help him feel better.

Once I started adding GastroBalance to Buddy’s food each day, things slowly changed — and such a relief washed over me. The irritation cleared, he was comfortable again, and his happy little personality came back. Knowing he’s feeling good again honestly helped me relax too. When our dogs are okay, everything feels lighter.

What I love about these soft chews is how gentle they are:

✦ They help soften hard stools naturally

✦ They support regular, healthy bowel movements

✦ They add extra fibre without upsetting sensitive tummies

They’re small, tasty (Buddy loves them), and so easy to give. It’s amazing how something so simple can make such a difference:

with a tasty chicken flavour: www.amazon.es/dp/B09SY826BK

or with a delicious bacon flavour: www.amazon.es/dp/B09SY85578

If your dog doesn’t get much fibre, I truly recommend GastroBalance — not as a last resort, but as a way to care for them before they ever have to feel uncomfortable. Our dogs trust us with everything, and keeping them feeling calm and comfortable is such a beautiful way to give that love back 🤍

Just visit the GastroBalance store to find a premium natural supplement for your lovely dog : www.amazon.es/gastrobalance and enjoy a FREE delivery offered by Amazon 🎁

events.fullCaption:
Hola, soy Miel 🍯… aunque casi nadie me dice así.
Para los compas soy *MielSushi*, *Mieldita*, *Mieles*… y en los bajos mundos: **Colmillos** 😈🐶

Me gusta el cotorreo, salir y morder TODO (es talento, no problema). Si me dejan sola, me pongo dramática y aúllo como artista 🎤🐺. Soy extrovertida nivel molestar a mi hermana Lola la gata 🐱… aunque ella finja que no le gusto 😌

Amo comer 🍗, “rescatar” medias y zapatos 🧦👟… y ayudar en el negocio de mi abuelita 🍺 recogiendo envases como toda una trabajadora juiciosa, pero aquí claramente **no valoran a los empleados** 😤

No soy tranquila… pero sí inolvidable.
✨ Vota por Miel, la única Colmillos ✨

#TeamMiel #Colmillos #ConcursoCanino #PerrosConActitud 🐾🔥

events.fullCaption:
Encore une belle journée ( en chien 🐶 car la météo 🌩️☔️)
Le réveil matinal , il commence par une séance de jeu entre Vega et Oreo. 
Ensuite j’ai été retrouvé Tweeny, et là je prononce le mot balade : Mlle se met directement sur le paillasson, assise à attendre que je lui mette le harnais et sa laisse… nous voilà parti, une chance avant l’orage 🙂
Cet après midi c’est séance de câlins, de papouilles et ce soir une belle balade pour profiter des derniers rayons du soleil ☀️ une louloute en forme 
Cet après midi, c’était balade avec les copains Taïga et Alto. Vega a rencontré un très bon copain de jeu en Alto. Petit tour au ruisseau. 

#bergeramericain #baladecanine #petsitter

events.captionPreview:
Tu t’es déjà posé cette question ?
Tu n’es pas seul.e, et c’est normal !

Dans cette série “Pourquoi ?” je reviens sur des sujets d'éducation canine, simplement, sans jugement et avec bienveillance.
events.fullCaption:
Tu t’es déjà posé cette question ?
Tu n’es pas seul.e, et c’est normal !

Dans cette série “Pourquoi ?” je reviens sur des sujets d'éducation canine, simplement, sans jugement et avec bienveillance.

🔸 Besoin d’aide avec ton chien ?

events.fullCaption:
🤩SE HIT🤩

Vi har massa roliga och spännande aktiviteter i butiken under April 🐶💚

💚 4/4 9:00 - Valpträff
Vi kommer att fokusera på att utmana valpens hjärna, stärka samarbetet och ha kul tillsammans.
Vi genomför gemensamt enklare övningar och trix anpassade för valpen, det finns olika övningar att testa på i olika svårighetsgrader!
79:- För dig som är eller blir medlem i klubben
99:- För icke medlemmar
Föranmälan krävs, begränsat antal platser. Anmäl dig direkt i butiken eller maila k7@arkenzoo.se

💚9/4 19:00 - Berikningskväll 
Under kvällen pratar vi om berikning för både hund, katt och smådjur. Vi visar hur du enkelt kan aktivera ditt djur mentalt i vardagen. Vi delar med oss av tips, idéer och produkter som kan göra stor skillnad för ditt djurs välmående.
Det är också ett perfekt tillfälle att ställa frågor om foder, aktivering eller annat kring din hund, katt eller smådjur, vi finns på plats för att hjälpa till.
📍 Kostnadsfritt 
☕ Självklart bjuder vi på fika!
✨ Platserna är begränsade så boka din plats redan nu:
📧 K7@arkenzoo.se

💚11/4 11:00 - Hundpromenad för renare gator 
 vi utanför butiken för en gemensam hundpromenad för renare gator. Vi går tillsammans en runda i området och passar på att plocka upp efter våra fyrbenta vänner små steg som gör stor skillnad för vår miljö!
Alla som deltar i promenaden får en rulle bajspåsar från oss i butiken.
Ta med din hund, gott humör och häng med oss på en trevlig promenad! 🐾

💚 24/4 19:30 - Uppfödarkväll! 
En trevlig kväll exklusivt för alla hund eller katt uppfödare, Vi bjuder på tilltugg, Goodiebags och fantastiska erbjudanden!

events.fullCaption:
Trop chou, Arsène, n’est-ce pas ? La top classe avec son collier PopBrain. Il ne manque que la laisse et le sac à 💩pour que ses parents soient aussi stylés que lui ! 
Ça viendra : ils m’ont commandé une laisse à la mesure de sa curiosité et son entrain ! Elle doit être réglable sur plusieurs longueurs. Alors je m’y mets, et je l’appellerai le « Modèle Arsène ». 

Je te tiens au courant de la suite !

Mets un petit ❤️ si tu veux m’aider à faire connaître mes créations et envoie ce post à tes amis 🌭🐶🐾. 

.
#lausanne #chienssuisses #chiensaucisse #teckelsuisse

events.captionPreview:
Mon papa et moi 🤎

Salut, c’est Kenya, et aujourd’hui je te parle de mon papa chéri ! 

Il est venu me chercher quand j’avais 1an et que j’habitais dans une famille qui n’avait malheureusement pas le
events.fullCaption:
Mon papa et moi 🤎

Salut, c’est Kenya, et aujourd’hui je te parle de mon papa chéri ! 

Il est venu me chercher quand j’avais 1an et que j’habitais dans une famille qui n’avait malheureusement pas le temps pour moi. J’étais très malheureuse jusqu’à ce que Mark m’embarque et me fasse intégrer sa famille d’amour. Il a été très doux et patient avec moi - c’était donc facile pour moi de lui accorder ma confiance. On a fait beaucoup de cours d’éducation canine ensemble parce que j’étais pas la plus facile, et c’est là que mon papa s’est pris de passion pour l’éducation canine. 

Aujourd’hui, ça fait 5 ans qu’il pratique l’éducation canine, avec pour mot d’ordre : patience, douceur, bienveillance, fun et positif. Il a même obtenu son diplôme officiel d’éducateur canin et continue aujourd’hui de se former dans le comportementalisme. 

Grâce à lui, je suis devenue la super chienne que je suis aujourd’hui et je suis la plus heureuse de pouvoir partager cette vie avec vous ! 

#educationcaninesuisse #esucationcanine #esucationcaninepositive #chienssuisses #nyonchien #chiensnyon #lacôte
